content.text:
## Summary

Implemented suite 19/P07 acceptance criteria:

**Files modified:**
- `src/components/llm/ChatSurface.tsx` — wrapped in ErrorBoundary, added `role="region"` + `aria-label="Chat with the LLM"`.
- `src/components/llm/Message.tsx` — `role="article"` + `aria-labelledby` linked to the role-header `useId()`; renders inline `(no relevant material was retrieved…)` note when `noContext` is set.
- `src/components/llm/ChatInput.tsx` — textarea now `aria-label="Your question"` and `readOnly` while streaming (so focus is retained); Enter submits, Shift+Enter newlines, Esc stops streaming or blurs, global `Cmd/Ctrl+K` and bare `/` focus the input and scroll into view.
- `src/components/llm/ChatMessageList.tsx` — added `aria-atomic="false"`, passes `noContext` through to Message.
- `src/components/llm/useChat.ts` — error mapping for 400 / 429 (with X-minute calculation from `retryAfterSeconds`) / 502 / 503 / network / stream failure; meta event sets `noContext = retrievedCount === 0`.
- `src/lib/llm/chatTypes.ts` — added `noContext?: boolean` to `ClientChatMessage`.
- `src/components/primitives/Container.tsx` — forwards `role` and `aria-label`.
- `src/styles/chat.css` — styles for `.msg__no-context` + `.chat-error-boundary*`.
